payload.title: feat: bapXaura context-extract + context search commands
payload.body:
## What
Two new CLI commands:
- `bapXaura context-extract` — extracts last 48h opencode + codex conversations + git commits to `.tmp/context-extract.xml`, filtered to bapXauraAiBackend only
- `bapXaura context <query>` — searches extracted context for matching messages with surrounding lines

## Why
Agent needs to recall what user said across sessions. Markers (`bapXaura opencode compact`, `bapXaura codex compact`) act as conversation section dividers.

## What changed
- `cli/bapXaura`: added `cmd_context_extract` (SQLite → XML) and `cmd_context` (XML text search)
- Filters: opencode by directory, codex by cwd + user threads only
- Output: `.tmp/context-extract.xml` with sessions, messages, compactions, tool-calls, commits, markers

## Files
`cli/bapXaura` lines ~157-169 (help text), ~2036-2319 (extract), ~2320-2420 (search), ~2531 (dispatch)

## Test
```
bapXaura context-extract --hours 48
bapXaura context context-extract
```
